ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drag_and_drop_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drag-and-drop event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the drag-and-drop event (e.g., dragstart, drag) */,
  "target" TEXT /* The target element of the event (e.g., Source node, Immediate user selection) */,
  "cancelable" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the event is cancelable */,
  "drag_data_store_mode" TEXT /* The mode of the drag data store (e.g., Read/write mode, Protected mode) */,
  "drop_effect" TEXT /* The drop effect (e.g., none, move, copy, link) */,
  "default_action" TEXT /* The default action that occurs if the event is not canceled */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the event */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user's session */,
  "application_id" TEXT /* ID of the application where the event occurred */,
  "event_data" TEXT /* JSONB column to store additional event data and metadata */,
  "drag_data" TEXT /* The actual data being dragged */,
  "drag_element" TEXT /* The HTML element that is being dragged */,
  "drop_targets" TEXT /* The potential targets for dropping */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* The type of event (e.g., mouse, touch, keyboard) */,
  "event_sub_type" TEXT /* The subtype of event (e.g., mousemove, touchmove, keydown) */,
  "cancel_reason" TEXT /* The reason for canceling the event, if applicable */,
  "drop_effect_allowed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the drop effect is allowed */,
  "custom_event_handler" INTEGER /* Reference to a custom event handler function, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drag_data_stores" (
  "drag_data_store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drag data store */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the drag data store */,
  "mode" TEXT /* Mode of the drag data store (e.g., Read/write mode, Protected mode) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the drag data store was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the drag data store was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drag_data_store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drop_effects" (
  "drop_effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drop effect */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the drop effect */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the drop effect */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the drop effect was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the drop effect was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drop_effect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_handlers" (
  "event_handler_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event handler */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the event handler */,
  "function_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the event handler function */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event handler was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event handler was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_handler_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
